# lithtech-jupiter-user-supplied-build

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | lithtech-jupiter |
| Type | user-supplied-historical-build |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

Rights-safe reproduction recipe for users who already have a lawful local copy. The public repo records metadata, environment requirements, and build observations only.

## Environment

- legally held local LithTech Jupiter build 51 package outside this public metadata repo
- isolated Windows 2000 or Windows XP-era VM, or equivalent compatibility environment
- Microsoft Visual C++ 6.0 Service Pack 4
- Microsoft DirectX 8.1 SDK retail
- optional 3ds Max 3 or 4 and Maya 3 or 4 environment for exporter/tool validation
- local build transcript and dependency manifest captured as derived metadata

## Steps

- verify local package metadata against IA file-manifest hashes before mounting or extraction
- inspect the local package in an isolated environment without committing extracted files
- document directory layout, tool versions, engine/game boundaries, and sample asset boundaries
- prepare the VC6 and DirectX 8.1 build environment described by the development guide
- run the documented batch or workspace build path for the sample game and tools
- capture build logs, missing dependencies, produced binaries, and non-redistributable paths as metadata only
- promote repeatable commands and constraints into the LithTech Jupiter archive packet

## Expected Outputs

- local fixity transcript
- VM and toolchain manifest
- directory and component map
- compiler and linker transcript
- dependency gap list
- non-redistributable output inventory
- public-safe reproduction notes

## Artifacts

- lithtech-jupiter-build51-archive-item
- lithtech-jupiter-development-guide

## Evidence Sources

| Source | Type | Confidence | Scope | URL |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| LithTech Jupiter archive item | archive-item | moderate | Internet Archive metadata for the LithTech Jupiter build 51 item, including identifier, publication date, package description, collection placement, and original file fixity. | https://archive.org/details/lithengine |
| Jupiter Development Guide full text | document-ocr | moderate | OCR and PDF reference for the Jupiter Development Guide version 2002.03.19, including toolchain requirements, component layout, build paths, and legal notices. | https://archive.org/stream/lithengine/JupiterDevGuide_djvu.txt |
